title: Endor and the Moddell Sector
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref}}
{{MagazineArticle

|author=*[[Craig Robert Carey]]

|release date=[[March 12]], [[2002]]<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/rpg/news20020222.html|text=Starfighters Soar in Gamer #9}} indicates that [[Star Wars Gamer 9|''Star Wars Gamer'' 9]] shipped to subscribers on [[February 22]], [[2002]], and both issues 8 and 10 were sent to newstands 18 days after their subscriber ship date; thus, ''Star Wars Gamer'' 9 was published on [[March 12]].</ref>

"'''Endor and the Moddell Sector'''" is an article in [[Star Wars Gamer 9|''Star Wars Gamer'' 9]]. The article covered several aspects of the forest moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] and the [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]], giving brief histories and stats.

The adventure scenario ''[[Wired to Kill]]'' was published as part of the article.
